title: Persea longipes
taxonomy: Persea longipes is a species in the genus Persea, which is part of the family Lauraceae. This classification places it within the order Laurales and the clade Magnoliophyta, which includes flowering plants. The species is also classified as a member of the subclass Magnoliidae and the clade Angiosperms. This classification reflects the plant's botanical relationships and evolutionary history. As a member of the Lauraceae family, Persea longipes is often associated with other plants that share similar characteristics and growth habits.
uses: Persea longipes, also known as the long-styled avocado, is a plant species native to Central America.
